_README: Weekly report line definitions. EDIT THIS FILE to match the official BOL report layout.
Each line matches transactions by Pur_5 prefix. Matching is longest-prefix-wins, so a
6-digit code overrides the 2-digit code it sits under. Anything unmatched falls into
id      - stable key, do not reuse across lines
lo/en   - labels shown in the report (Lao / English)
codes   - list of Pur_5 prefixes, e.g. "01" matches 01, 0101, 010105 ...
bankOwn - true if this line is a commercial bank's own-account business. The report's
second section (bo lolm thurakam khong thanakhan thurakit) excludes these.
order   - display order within the inflow / outflow block
VERIFY BEFORE OFFICIAL USE: the sector split between government / state enterprise /
business / commercial bank borrowing is NOT derivable from Pur_5 alone. The default
below splits loans by counterparty sector using bankOwnRule. Check it against a known

bankOwnRule._note: A transaction is treated as commercial-bank own-account when the Lao-side entity name matches one of these patterns (case-insensitive substring), OR the line is flagged bankOwn.

lines.lo: ຄ່າການບໍລິການ
ຄ່າດອກເບ້ຍ ແລະ ເງິນໂອນ
ການລົງທຶນໂດຍກົງຢູ່ຕ່າງປະເທດ / ຖອນກັບຄືນມາລາວ
ການລົງທຶນໂດຍກົງຈາກຕ່າງປະເທດ
ການລົງທຶນໃນຫຼັກຊັບ
ເງິນລົງທຶນອະນຸພັນທາງການເງິນ
ເງິນຝາກກັບທະນາຄານ
ເງິນກູ້ຢືມ
ສິນເຊື່ອການຄ້າ ແລະ ເງິນຈ່າຍລ່ວງໜ້າ
